reviews.review_description:
I would be glad to Rate this app so far I enjoy it when it loads I can shoot the balls at the target. What the two targets don’t break up like you show if you could fix this. I would be glad to Rate it Thank you when it’s playing right I think I’ll be giving you a good rating on it. Looks like a Lotta fun. 👍￼￼￼￼￼


Still ain’t working it shows something on the gun the pump but I can pump it and also shows a site to put on the bad guys that’s not working. I am running shoe at the guys specially the first one who has the target on his head doesn’t break it apart. Can’t go any further to play the other Targets if you can’t fix it, let me know so I can get a refund I have a game that doesn’t play thank you 👎



Hey Snow, I am working right side of a gun, but I can’t pull the cord out. Doesn’t have  a Site still doesn’t break up The bad guys  👎👎👎￼￼￼￼￼￼￼￼


I still can’t get the gun to pump for power. I guess it shoots balls out at the big black guy, but he doesn’t fall apart and it needs a site on the gun when this would Be fun to play. If only I could play it like it like I like your description when I chose to purchase hope you can fix it and then I will rate it 👎￼
